title: SAM acts on Nazara's ₹918 crore stake acquisition in Bluetile Games and BestPlay Systems
description: Nazara Technologies Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary Nazara Technologies UK Limited, has acquired a 50% controlling stake in Bluetile Games S.L. and BestPlay Systems S.L., for an initial consideration of approximately $100.3 million (~₹918 crore).Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas & Co acted as legal counsel to the sellers on this transaction.The transaction team was led by Natashaa Shroff (Partner), Taranjeet Singh (Partner), Gouri Puri (Partner), and Rahul Yadav (Partner), with suppor
